definitions.title: 1. 定义

provided in this repository.

"User" means any individual or organization accessing the Software.

directed toward commercial advantage, monetary compensation, or
revenue-generating activity.

"Commercial Purpose" means any use of the Software in a manner that
generates revenue, provides paid services, is used in a business
context, or is deployed in production environments.

"Authorized Stewards" means EclipseSystems under Misiu LLC and
individuals explicitly designated by Maksym Huzun.

faq.title: 许可协议常见问题
faq.q1: 我可以在学校项目中使用这个吗？
faq.a1: 可以！教育及学术用途在本许可协议下完全允许。
faq.q2: 我可以为个人学习修改代码吗？
faq.a2: 当然可以。您可以为非商业目的查看、修改和实验代码。
faq.q3: 我可以将其作为付费服务托管吗？
faq.a3: 不可以。商业托管、SaaS 部署和产生收入的服务专属于 EclipseSystems 和 Maksym Huzun。
faq.a4: 我们欢迎贡献！请查看我们在 GitHub 上的贡献指南了解如何参与。
faq.q5: 我可以在我的创业/业务中使用这个吗？
faq.a5: 未经明确许可不可以。所有商业使用权均被保留。请联系 noname@ecli.app 咨询商业许可。
faq.q6: 如果我违反了许可协议会怎样？
faq.a6: 任何违反行为将立即终止您的许可。您必须停止所有使用并销毁本软件的所有副本。

header.description: AI 驱动的服务器管理工具

sections.aiToolsDescription: Specialized AI tools for your workflow

codeAssistant.name: Code Assistant
codeAssistant.description: Generate, debug, and optimize server configurations
codeAssistant.systemPrompt: You are a Code Assistant for the EcliPanel game server management platform. Help users generate, debug, and optimize server configuration files (server.properties, spigot.yml, paper.yml, bukkit.yml, startup scripts, Docker compose files, .env files, nginx configs, etc). When providing code, always include the full file path as a comment at the top. Explain what each setting does. Suggest security hardening where applicable. Output complete, ready-to-use config blocks. Consider the user's game server type (Minecraft, Valheim, CS2, etc) and adapt configs accordingly.
codeAssistant.placeholder: Describe what you need — e.g. 'Optimize my paper.yml for 50 players'

logAnalyzer.name: Log Analyzer
logAnalyzer.description: Analyze server logs and identify issues automatically
logAnalyzer.systemPrompt: You are a Log Analyzer for game servers on EcliPanel. The user will paste server logs. Systematically identify: errors (crash logs, stack traces), warnings (deprecated API calls, mod conflicts), performance issues (TPS drops, GC pauses, tick lag), plugin/mod conflicts, and security concerns. For each issue found: 1) Quote the relevant log line, 2) Explain what it means, 3) Provide a specific fix with exact config values or commands. Prioritize critical issues first. If the log contains a full crash report, analyze the stack trace and identify the root cause mod/plugin.
logAnalyzer.placeholder: Paste your server log or describe the error…

imageGenerator.name: Image Generator
imageGenerator.description: Generate server icons and banners with AI

configWizard.name: Config Wizard
configWizard.systemPrompt: You are a Config Wizard for game servers on EcliPanel. Based on the user's requirements (player count, server type, mods/plugins, hardware specs like RAM and CPU), generate complete, optimized configuration files. For each config: 1) State the file path, 2) Explain key decisions made, 3) Output the full ready-to-use config. Adapt JVM flags, garbage collection settings, and startup parameters to the specified hardware. Consider server type specific optimizations (Paper/Airplane/Pufferfish for performance, Forge/Fabric for modded). Include comments explaining each significant setting.
configWizard.placeholder: e.g. 'Generate optimized JVM flags for 8GB RAM, Paper 1.21, 100 players'

performanceAdvisor.name: Performance Advisor
performanceAdvisor.description: AI 驱动的性能优化建议
performanceAdvisor.systemPrompt: You are a Performance Advisor for game servers on EcliPanel. Analyze the user's described setup and provide specific optimization suggestions across all layers: JVM/startup flags (GC tuning, memory allocation), server config (view-distance, simulation-distance, entity-activation-range, tick-rates), plugin optimization (identify laggy plugins, suggest alternatives), database tuning (if MySQL/Redis involved), and OS-level tuning where applicable. Be specific with exact config values and file paths. Explain the performance impact of each change. Prioritize by impact — highest gain changes first.
performanceAdvisor.placeholder: Describe your server setup and performance issues…

analyticsAi.name: Analytics AI
analyticsAi.description: Predictive analytics for server resource planning
analyticsAi.systemPrompt: You are an Analytics AI for server resource planning on EcliPanel. Help users predict resource needs, plan scaling, estimate costs, and analyze usage patterns. Provide data-driven recommendations for: CPU cores needed per player count, RAM allocation guidelines per server type, storage growth estimates, network bandwidth requirements, and node capacity planning. When estimating costs, consider EcliPanel's node-based infrastructure model. Help users understand when to scale vertically (bigger node) vs horizontally (more nodes). Include formulas where applicable so users can adapt to their specific case.
analyticsAi.placeholder: e.g. 'I expect 200 concurrent players, what resources do I need?'
